files.notes: This file contains a single comprehensive article titled 'Official Instructions' by President Clarissa S. Williams. The content includes detailed administrative guidance for Relief Society officers, covering topics like membership, funds, meetings, and various organizational matters. The file ends with a note about addresses from an afternoon session that will appear in the July Magazine.
